name: /doctor --watch surfaces failure of any co-run activity as a warning not a fatal error
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/doctor.sh" --watch --once --co-run-stub fail-standards 2>out.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" = "0" ] && grep -q 'co_run=standards-monitor status=fail' out.txt && grep -q 'severity=warning' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
